## Permanent crop harvest

```{r}
#| label: permanent crop harvest table

perm_parcel_plot_crop_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "perm_crop_harvest_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::perm_crop_harvest(
  parcel_plot_crop_df = perm_parcel_plot_crop_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  crop_id_var = monitor50x30:::extract_id_var_names(params_df$perm_crop_harvest_crop_id_var),
  crop_vals = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$perm_crop_harvest_crop_vals[[1]]),
  produce_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$perm_crop_harvest_produce_var),
  harvest_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$perm_crop_harvest_harvest_var),
  harvest_val = 1,
  group_var = "supervisor"
)

```
